violations.description: Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Food removed from original packaging was not placed in a container with an impervious and nonabsorbent cover. - Working containers need to have impervious and nonabsorbent covers. Several containers in fridges and prep table cooler in need of lids.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. - Filters in need of cleaning. Establishments should maintain cleanings on a regular basis between professional hood cleanings.
